recommendation.summary: All categories at zero with the week half gone and three nights of good culture in Ann Arbor still ahead. The Subsurface 2026 CFP closes July 17 — the last day of the Ann Arbor stay — making this the week to draft a proposal. Pair a YMCA session with a live music night to build health and culture momentum before the weekend.

suggested.title: Subsurface 2026 CFP — deadline July 17 (virtual data/AI open lakehouse conference)
Ann Arbor YMCA — morning workout or pool session (400 W Washington St)
Sonic Lunch — Theo Katzman (free, Thu Jul 9, 11:30am, Liberty & Division)
